zh.lifeSummary: 當Gundreda Paynel於從1135年到1143年出生在英國英格蘭戴文巴普頓時，她的父親Foulques Paynel of Bampton24歲，母親Lesceline de Subligny14歲。她於1202年與Ralph Bray結婚。她去世於大約1216年在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gundreda Paynel于从1135年到1143年出生在英国英格兰戴文巴普頓时，她的父亲Foulques Paynel of Bampton24岁，母亲Lesceline de Subligny14岁。她于1202年与Ralph Bray结婚。她去世于大约1216年在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Paynel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Payne , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Gundreda Paynel was born from 1135 to 1143, in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, was 24 and her mother, Lesceline de Subligny, was 14. She married Ralph Bray in 1202. She died about 1216, in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gundreda Paynel est née du 1135 au 1143, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lesceline de Subligny, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Bray en 1202. Elle est décédée environ 1216, à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gundreda Paynel von 1135 bis 1143 in Bampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Foulques Paynel of Bampton 24 und ihre Mutter Lesceline de Subligny 14. Sie hat 1202 Ralph Bray geheiratet. Sie starb um 1216 in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gundreda Paynel è nata il da 1135 a 1143 nel Bampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Lesceline de Subligny, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Bray nel 1202. Morì circa 1216, nel Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gundreda Paynelがから1135年まで1143年にイギリスイギリスデボンバンプトンで生まれた時，父Foulques Paynel of Bamptonは24歳，母Lesceline de Sublignyは14歳であった。1202年にRalph Brayと結婚した。彼女は約1216年にイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gundreda Paynel(이)가 1135년 부터 1143년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Foulques Paynel of Bampton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lesceline de Subligny(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1202년 Ralph Bray(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 대략 1216년 영국 데폰에서 사망했다.

mn.Bampton, Tiverton, Devon, England: Bampton, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gundreda Paynel nasceu de 1135 a 1143, em Bampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Foulques Paynel of Bampton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lesceline de Subligny, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Bray em 1202. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1216, em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gundreda Paynel родилась с 1135 по 1143 в местности бамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Foulques Paynel of Bampton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lesceline de Subligny, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Bray в 1202 г. Она умерла около 1216 г. в местности девон, Англия.
